name: Makeruna!! Aku no Gundan!
original_name: まけるな!! あくのぐんだん！
overview: The "Evil Corps," led by Don, are on a mission to conquer the universe. They set out to invade Earth first, but they struggle as some quirky Earthlings stand in their way. Eventually Don's plan to invade Earth becomes distorted...?!

trailers.title: TVアニメ「まけるな!! あくのぐんだん！」特報映像
